title: Tab component with dynamic icon rendering and interactive controls
purpose: Renders individual tabs with appropriate icons, hover effects, and interactive controls like pinning, promoting, and closing. Used within a tab navigation system.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named Tab that accepts tab descriptors and various callback handlers for user interactions. Includes a helper function getItemIcon that maps tab types to SVG icons.

steps.content: Map the tab type to a corresponding SVG icon component.
Return a specific SVG icon for each supported tab type including diagram, design, spreadsheet, snippet, embed, image, blueprint, code-file, task-graph, and task-details.
Return a default document icon for all other tab types.
Determine the icon type based on whether the tab is an artifact or not.
Construct base CSS classes for the tab element including spacing, alignment, and border styling.
Apply active state CSS classes if the tab is currently selected.
Render the tab element with icon, name, and interactive controls.
Display a promote button for preview tabs with a hover opacity effect.
Display a pin button for regular tabs with conditional opacity and hover effects.
Display a close button with hover opacity effect when not hidden.
